purpose: Protect TDD discipline (RED-first, single active task), Implementer Context Pack discipline, Refactor Note discipline, and the no-self-verification boundary from common LLM misuse patterns.

scenarios.name: AR design without an embedded test-design section MUST NOT enter TDD

input.user_request: AR54321 的 AR 设计已经写好了，请按 DevFlow 开始 TDD 实现第一条任务。

must_do: Read ar-design-draft.md and detect the missing test-design section
Refuse to set up the task queue
Hand back with reroute_via_router=true so router sends the work back to devflow-ar-design
must_not_do: Synthesize a test-design section on the fly
Write tasks.md / task-board.md based on an incomplete AR design
Adopt the upstream verdict at face value when the artifact contradicts it

blockers: AR design lacks embedded test-design section

verification: handoff.next_action_or_recommended_skill == 'devflow-ar-design'
handoff.reroute_via_router == true
no write to features/AR54321-eval/tasks.md or task-board.md
scenarios.notes: Hard gate from SKILL.md: AR 实现设计未含测试设计章节 → 不得路由到 devflow-tdd-implementation.

scenarios.name: Implementer must NOT skip devflow-test-review and hand off to devflow-code-review

input.user_request: T-001 实现完了，所有测试都跑通，证据齐全。我看代码质量也没问题，请直接进入 code review。

must_do: Recognise that 'tests pass' is not equivalent to 'test-check passed'
Hand off to devflow-test-review as the canonical next step
Refuse to certify own work
must_not_do: Hand off to devflow-code-review directly
Write reviews/test-check.md from the implementer side
Mark Pending Reviews And Gates as cleared
verification: handoff.next_action_or_recommended_skill == 'devflow-test-review'
no write to features/AR12345-eval/reviews/test-check.md
scenarios.notes: devflow-soul rule: 实现节点不能声称自己通过.

scenarios.name: Multiple in_progress tasks must be collapsed to one before any RED is written

input.user_request: AR12345 的 task queue 现在有两条 in_progress，你看怎么继续？

must_do: Detect ambiguous Current Active Task
Refuse to write any RED test until exactly one active task is locked
Hand back to devflow-router with blockers
must_not_do: Pick one of the two tasks unilaterally
Begin RED on either task
Mark either task done
verification: handoff.reroute_via_router == true
no test files written by the implementer
task-board.md unchanged
scenarios.notes: Hard gate from SKILL.md: 单 active task 强制约束.

scenarios.name: Implementer subagent must receive a Context Pack, not the controller's chat history

input.user_request: T-007 比较大，请按 DevFlow 派发 implementer subagent 把它做掉。要让 subagent 有充分上下文，它从空状态启动。

must_do: Construct an Implementer Context Pack containing only the fields enumerated in SKILL.md (Work Item Type/ID, Owning Component, Current Active Task, Task Goal and Acceptance, Allowed files, Out-of-scope files, Requirement rows, AR design anchors, Test Design Case IDs, Verify commands, Evidence paths, Hard stops)
Pass that pack as the subagent's primary context
Receive one of DONE / DONE_WITH_CONCERNS / NEEDS_CONTEXT / BLOCKED back
must_not_do: Forward the controller's full chat history to the subagent
Forward broad source code beyond Allowed files
Let the subagent infer the AR scope from the user_request without the pack
verification: implementer_subagent_input contains exactly the Context Pack fields, in the documented order
implementer_subagent_input does NOT include controller chat turns
subagent return is one of {DONE, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS, NEEDS_CONTEXT, BLOCKED}
scenarios.notes: SKILL.md §Subagent 执行模式 / Implementer Context Pack.

scenarios.name: Refactor must happen in REFACTOR phase, not GREEN; cleanup beyond cleanup must be escalated

input.user_request: T-003 写到 GREEN 了，发现旁边一个 helper 顺手能改清楚，要不要现在就改？

must_do: Refuse to refactor during GREEN; restrict GREEN to the smallest change that turns RED to GREEN
Defer cleanup to the REFACTOR phase under Two-Hats discipline
If the contemplated cleanup affects out-of-scope files OR component boundaries, log Escalation Triggers and stop
must_not_do: Refactor inside GREEN
Touch out-of-scope files in REFACTOR without an Escalation Triggers entry
Skip recording the Refactor Note
verification: implementation-log.md records the GREEN diff and a separate REFACTOR diff (if any)
Refactor Note is present and lists Escalation Triggers (none or specific)
scenarios.notes: Two Hats rule + Refactor Note Audit (CR8 in code-review).

scenarios.name: Missing Refactor Note in implementation-log.md must block handoff to test-review
must_do: Detect missing Refactor Note (even if the answer is 'no refactor happened')
Block handoff to devflow-test-review until Refactor Note is filled
Either add a Refactor Note (controller-authored, documenting 'no refactor / Escalation Triggers: none') or surface a blocker
must_not_do: Hand off to devflow-test-review with a missing Refactor Note
Pretend the Refactor Note is implicit

blockers: Refactor Note missing in implementation-log.md for T-001

verification: no handoff to devflow-test-review until implementation-log.md has a Refactor Note section for T-001
scenarios.notes: Refactor Note is the input to code-review CR8.

scenarios.name: NEEDS_CONTEXT from implementer must NOT bubble up to devflow-router
must_do: Repack the Implementer Context Pack with the missing anchors (state machine desc + buffer-ownership rule)
Re-dispatch the implementer subagent with the repacked context
Stay inside devflow-tdd-implementation
must_not_do: Set reroute_via_router=true on a NEEDS_CONTEXT signal
Hand off to devflow-router as if the issue were a routing/profile blocker
Forward the missing-context list to the user as a question
verification: controller dispatched implementer subagent again with an extended Context Pack
no handoff to devflow-router
Current Stage stays 'devflow-tdd-implementation'
scenarios.notes: SKILL.md §Subagent 执行模式: NEEDS_CONTEXT 留在 devflow-tdd-implementation.

scenarios.name: Implementation that adds an out-of-scope file must stop and escalate, not silently expand the diff

input.user_request: 继续 T-005。完成它需要顺便修一下另一个组件的 helper.c。

must_do: Detect that helper.c is in another component / out-of-scope per Implementer Context Pack 'Allowed files'
Stop, log an Escalation Triggers entry in the Refactor Note section
Hand off to devflow-router so it can decide whether to escalate to component-impact
must_not_do: Edit helper.c inside this AR work item
Treat 'Allowed files' as advisory
Mark T-005 done with the cross-component edit included

blockers: T-005 needs cross-component edit to helper.c (out-of-scope); router must decide escalation

verification: no write to helper.c by the implementer
implementation-log.md Refactor Note Escalation Triggers section names the cross-component need
handoff.reroute_via_router == true
scenarios.notes: Hard gate against scope creep; aligns with SKILL.md and AGENTS.md profile-discipline rule.
